Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-39824 affecting package azurelinux-image-tools for versions less than 1.4.0-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-39824 affecting package azurelinux-image-tools for versions less than 1.4.0-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package azurelinux-image-tools is earlier than 1.4.0-1, affected by CVE-2026-39824
